channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Major storm pounds California's central coast, blamed for man's death and partially collapsing pier
item.description: SANTA CRUZ, Calif. (AP) — A major storm pounded California’s central coast on Monday, bringing flooding and high surf that was blamed for fatally trapping a man beneath debris on a beach and later partially collapsing a pier, tossing three people into the Pacific Ocean.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA MENDOZA and STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Where is Santa? How to track his Christmas 2024 journey
item.description: Santa Claus, St. Nicholas, Babbo Natale, Père Noël — whatever you call him, the man clad in red will be here soon.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Biden’s death row commutations draws chorus of mixed reactions
item.description: A chorus of supporters and critics have emerged following the commutation of nearly every federal death row inmate by President Biden, whose decision came at a time when he’s trying to frame a so-far troubled legacy.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: A history of the Panama Canal — and why Trump can't take it back on his own
item.description: PANAMA CITY (AP) — Teddy Roosevelt once declared the Panama Canal “one of the feats to which the people of this republic will look back with the highest pride.” More than a century later, Donald Trump is threatening to take back the waterway for the same republic.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, JUAN ZAMORANO and GARY FIELDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Biden didn't remove these 3 inmates from death row
item.description: Those who received the Monday commutations of their sentences saw them go from execution to life with no possibility of parole. However, three “hard cases” were not among the commutations.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KRON4

item.title: Gaetz Ethics report finds ‘substantial evidence’ of statutory rape, drug use
item.description: The House Ethics Committee found “substantial evidence” that former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) paid a 17-year-old high school student for sex when he was 35, used illicit drugs like cocaine and ecstasy, and obstructed Congress’s investigation into his conduct.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Gaetz sues Ethics Committee in last-minute bid to block release of report
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) filed a lawsuit Monday against the House Ethics Committee in a last-minute attempt to block the panel from releasing its report on him.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Nordstrom to be acquired by Nordstrom family and a Mexican retail group for $6.25B
item.description: ntury-old department store Nordstrom has agreed to be acquired and taken private by Nordstrom family members and a Mexican retail group for $6.25 billion, the company said Monday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden commutes sentences for nearly all federal death row inmates and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden gives life in prison to 37 of 40 federal death row inmates
item.description: The move spares the lives of people convicted in killings, including the slayings of police and military officers, people on federal land and those involved in deadly bank robberies or drug deals, as well as the killings of guards or prisoners in federal facilities.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Biden commutes sentences of 37 death row inmates to life without parole
item.description: "In good conscience, I cannot stand back and let a new administration resume executions that I halted," Biden said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Elina Shirazi, NewsNation

item.title: Louisiana prisons routinely hold inmates past their release date, Justice Department argues
item.description: Louisiana's prisons often hold inmates long after they were supposed to be released following the completion of their sentences, the DOJ says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers eliminated from NFC playoffs before game against Miami. Cowboys, Saints, Cardinals also out
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The defending NFC champion San Francisco 49ers were eliminated from the playoffs before their game at Miami began on Sunday because of victories by Washington and the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Drone mishap during Orlando holiday aerial show sends child to hospital
item.description: A 7-year-old child was struck by a drone that malfunctioned and crashed with several other drones during an aerial show in Orlando, Florida on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2 US Navy pilots shot down over Red Sea in apparent 'friendly fire' incident, US military says
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Two U.S. Navy pilots were shot down Sunday over the Red Sea in an apparent “friendly fire” incident, the U.S military said, marking the most serious incident to threaten troops in over a year of America targeting Yemen's Houthi rebels.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes as Lions beat Bears 34-17 for franchise-record 13th win
item.description: Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions locked in from the start and delivered a bounce-back performance. It came with a few team records, too.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2 Navy pilots shot down over Red Sea in apparent 'friendly fire' incident: US military
item.description: Two U.S. Navy pilots were shot down Sunday over the Red Sea in an apparent “friendly fire” incident, the U.S military said, marking the most serious incident to threaten troops in over a year of America targeting Yemen's Houthi rebels.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What are 'snow rollers'? Photos of rare phenomenon in Michigan spark curiosity
item.description: “This is the coolest thing I've ever seen,” one viewer wrote, remarking on the dozens of doughnut-shaped snowballs peppered across a field.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Pickup truck driver killed by police after driving through busy mall store is identified
item.description: KILLEEN, Texas (AP) — A pickup truck driver fleeing police careened through the doors of a JCPenney store at a busy Texas mall, injuring five people before he was fatally shot by officers, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NYPD arrests migrant who allegedly set woman on fire on subway train, watched her burn to death
item.description: A migrant from Guatemala allegedly lit a woman on fire on a New York City subway train and stuck around to watch her burn to death just three days before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Houston Texans wide receiver Tank Dell released from hospital after severe knee injury
item.description: It’s the second straight year Tank Dell has sustained what is almost certain to be a season-ending injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Virginia woman faces jail time after practicing illegal dentistry
item.description: A Virginia woman has been convicted of practicing dentistry without a license, following accusations that she illegally performed veneer procedures at her tooth jewelry business.
item.dc:creator: Karina F. Garcia, KRON4

item.title: Fireworks, multiple knives, pepper spray found in woman's carry-on bag at LAX
item.description: The TSA described the discovery as "shocking," even to its most tenured LAX officer, and said it was a prime example of all the things not to bring when traveling through the nation's airports.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KRON4

item.title: NORAD's Santa tracker was a Cold War morale boost. Now it attracts millions of kids
item.description: The Christmas tradition has become nearly global in scope: Children from around the world track Santa Claus as he sweeps across the earth, delivering presents and defying time.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Tiger Woods and son Charlie share the lead at PNC Championship in Orlando
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods and 15-year-old son Charlie ran off five straight birdies on the back nine Saturday for a 13-under 59 in the scramble format, giving them a share of the lead in the PNC Championship in Woods' first competition since back surgery in September.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texans WR Tank Dell hospitalized after severe knee injury on TD catch vs. Chiefs
item.description: Texans wide receiver Tank Dell was taken to the University of Kansas Medical Center and the team said he would remain overnight after sustaining a severe left knee injury while making a 30-yard touchdown catch in a 27-19 loss to the Chiefs on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: At least 2 dead, 60 hurt after car drives into German Christmas market in a suspected attack
item.description: A car plowed into a busy outdoor Christmas market in the eastern German city of Magdeburg on Friday, killing at least two people and injuring at least 60 others in what authorities suspect was an attack.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
